title: scabiosa stellata var. simplex
intro: Scabiosa stellata var. simplex is a rare and lesser-known variety of the pincushion flower, a perennial plant that belongs to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and supporting the immune system. Scabiosa stellata var. simplex can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
